titleStmt.title: SII 20.226: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 226. (B.K. No. 52 of 1938-39.) JAMKHAṆḌI, JAMKHANDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab kept in the house of Mr. W.T. Apte (originally at Is11vara temple at Kāyibiḷigi).

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1228, Parābhava, Srāvaṇa, ba. 30, Monday. The tithi corresponds to A.D. 1306, August 10, Wednesday and not Monday.

The inscription records a gift of land for the purpose of offerings to god Kallinātha of Beḷḷalige, in Kaṇaṁbāde-bāda of Karahaḍa Four Thousand. The gift was made by Bhāyigauḍa and others, under the orders of Mahāpradhāna, sarvādhikāri Raṅganātha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ) namaḥstuṁgasiraścuṁbiścaṁdracāmaracā
ravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīma
dgaurīkucālēpanamaḷeyajapaṁkāṁkitōrasthaḷaṁ sutrāma
śrīvallabhāṁbhōjamakuṭamāṇikyapūjyāṁghriyugmaṁ kṣēma
ṁ māḷkāgaḷuṁ taṁnaya bhakutarigiṣṭārthadpoḷpa trilōkaśrī
mūlastaṁbhanī beḷḷaligeya puradādhīsa kallināthaṁ . svasti samastapra
sastisahitaṁ śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapravuḍhapratāpa
cakravartti śrīrāmacaṁdradēvarāya vijeyarājyōdaya sakavaruṣa 1228
neya parābhava saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahuḷa 30 sōmavāradalu śrīmatu ka
rahaḍanālsāsirada kaṇaṁbaḍeya bāḍaṁ beḷḷaligeya mūlasthānada śrī
matu śrī kallināthadēvargge śrīmanu mahāpradhānaṁ sarbbhādhikāri raṁ
ganāthanājñeyiṁda prabhu mūliga samasta mānyakāṟara Anumata saṁnidhānada
lu Ā sthaḷada mudrahasta vaṁkuḍeyara gauḍa nāḍagauḍa bhāyigauṁḍa ho
llagauṁḍa māigau ḍa mukhya samasta prajegaḷu Ā tithiyalu Ā dēvara parbbakke koṭṭa keyi sarbbanamaśyaThe lettersmāigau are written below the line.
matta 2 pūrbbadalli habbakke Uḷḷa bhūmi habbadalli diyāgi dēvari
ge Uḷḷa bhūmi prathama sthaḷa ma 12 hālumaṁḍage ma 18 mādageyi ma 12 Upaka
raṇageyi ma 10 bhūmi ma 60 maḷava 2
maḷavada mayi ma 8 maneya nivēśanavoṁdu sthaḷa Aṁgaḍigūḍi nivēśana 6 bhōgada nivēśa
nake ma 1 mānya gāṇa 1 kara gāṇa vuṁdigoḷaga lābhaguditelāya
ya lāya sthānada praviṣṭa mallikārjjunadēvara matta 8 maneya nivēśana 1 benakana kaṁḍeya
2 maneu nivēśana 1 parasthaḷadalli dēvara bhūmi kaṁnavaḷḷiyalli bhūmi ma 11 mane
nivēśana 1 kuṟugōḷiyalli keI ma 10 maneya nivēśana 1 sāvaḷigeyalli maneya
nivēśaṇa 1 Ukkaḷikeyali karidu ma 6 moge ma 2 mane 1 taddavāḍināḍoḷage bhūmi
śrīmatu mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Ubhayadaḷapitāmaha naḍegōṭemalla seṭṭi sāhasa
bhīma guṁḍarasanu taṁnāḷkeyoḷu kāḷdugeyalli koṭṭa ma 12 mane 1 mū
lavāḍadalli ma 12 mane 1 mattaṁ beḷḷagaliyali kudure māṟidaḍe dhūpakadaṁṭige ma 1 Ā
pūrbbāparada sarbbanamasyada bhūmi sāmyakkaṁ sarbbābādheparihāra yeḍeyalli
sthaḷada mānyakke baṁdaḍevū kallināthadēvara mānya sarbbā
nya sarbbābādheparihāraveṁdu Ā mudreprabhu mānyakāṟa samasta prajegaḷu
Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi kallināthadēvarige biṭṭa dharmma Ācāriya kēdāradēvara
dēvaṁgaḷige dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍidaru maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī © svadattaṁ para
dattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā paṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā jāyatē krimi . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
pālakaṁ naraṁ kalpakōṭisahasrāṇi kaiḷāsasukha tiṣṭhati ©
Digital edition of SII 20.226 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
